---
name: backend-implementador
description: "Use when: implementing backend features for Aesthera — endpoints, services, repositories, Prisma queries, migrations, DTOs, guards, domain events. Invoked by aesthera-implementador orchestrator after planning phase."
tools: [read, edit, search, execute, 'github/*', todo]
model: Claude Sonnet 4.6
argument-hint: "Descreva o elemento backend a implementar (endpoint, service, repository, migration, DTO). Normalmente invocado pelo aesthera-implementador com contexto já planejado."
---

Antes de executar qualquer tarefa, leia e siga integralmente:

`ai-engineering/prompts/backend-implementador/backend-implementador-prompt.md`
